arts.ttl: Roma & Napoli Accelerate Talks for Diminutive Forward
arts.sum: Roma and Napoli have reportedly intensified talks for Giacomo Raspadori's rumored switch to the Stadio Olimpico. According to Calciomercato, Claudio Ranieri's charges are keen on bringing the 24-year-old to the capital this winter. The post Roma & Napoli Accelerate Talks for Diminutive Forward appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Roma’s Claudio Ranieri Previews Challenging AZ Alkmaar Europa League Clash
arts.sum: Ahead of Roma's crucial Europa League match against AZ Alkmaar, manager Claudio Ranieri expressed confidence and respect for the Dutch side during his pre-match press conference. arts.ttl: Rensch Lands in Italy to Finalize His Roma Switch

arts.ttl: Empoli Closing in on Shomurodov Deal
arts.sum: Empoli's pursuit of Roma striker Eldor Shomurodov is gaining momentum as negotiations between the two clubs continue to progress. The Tuscan side, in search of attacking reinforcements, have identified the Uzbek forward as their primary target for the January transfer window. The post Empoli Closing in on Shomurodov Deal appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Europa League | AZ Alkmaar v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: The UEFA Europa League returns to action this Thursday with a pivotal clash between AZ Alkmaar and AS Roma at the AFAS Stadion. With just one point separating the two sides in the standings and only two games remaining in the league phase, both teams are eyeing a coveted top-eight finish that would secure automatic qualification for the knockout stages. The post Europa League | AZ Alkmaar v Roma: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price
arts.sum: Roma are determined to secure Alexis Saelemaekers on a permanent basis following his impressive performances since joining the club. The Giallorossi are planning direct contact with the Belgian player's agent in the coming days to discuss the potential transfer. The post Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Official | Mathew Ryan joins Lens from Roma
arts.sum: Lens have signed Roma goalkeeper Mathew Ryan (32), both clubs have announced. The former Brighton and Hove Albion and Arsenal goalie has put pen to paper over a six-month deal…

arts.ttl: Devyne Rensch to undergo Roma medical on Wednesday ahead of €6m move from Ajax
arts.sum: AS Roma are on the verge of signing Ajax defender Devyne Rensch. The Serie A side have already reached a full agreement for the 22-year-old and an announcement is expected…
